driver_subject: platform/goldfish: Convert pipe tasklet to threaded irq
stage1_reason: Driver converts deprecated tasklet API to threaded IRQ API: tasklet_struct removed, tasklet_init/schedule/kill replaced with devm_request_threaded_irq, IRQ_HANDLED changed to IRQ_WAKE_THREAD.
stage2_reason: Driver commit converts tasklet to threaded IRQ, while kernel commit introduces new tasklet initialization API, indicating deprecation path and migration pressure.
